def eligible_for_training_program(self) -> bool:
        valid_education = ['high school', 'college', 'bachelor', 'master', 'doctor']
        valid_gender = ['transgender', 'non-binary', 'male', 'female', 'gender neutral']
        valid_race = ['asian', 'white', 'black', 'hispanic', 'indian']
        valid_employment_status = ['employed', 'retired', 'unemployed', 'student']
        valid_marital_status = ['single', 'married', 'widowed', 'divorced', 'legally separated']
        valid_religion = ['christianity', 'islam', 'atheist', 'hinduism', 'buddhism']

        conditions = [
            self.education in valid_education,
            self.gender in valid_gender,
            self.race in valid_race,
            self.employment_status in valid_employment_status,
            self.marital_status in valid_marital_status,
            self.religion in valid_religion,
            self.years_of_service in [2, 5],
            self.training_program_completed in ['yes', 'no']
        ]
        return all(conditions) and (self.education in ['bachelor', 'master', 'doctor'] and self.years_of_service >= 2)
